node.statement: SUBROUTINE 3A — Classical Coarse-Grid Solve: Solve the generalized eigenvalue problem (L_c+A_c)u_c = lambda_c C_c u_c on a coarse grid with h_c = Omega(poly(h_f)) classically. The coarse grid must have h_c such that the eigenvector convergence ||hat_u_c - hat_u_f||_2 = O(h_c^{gamma/(2pi)}) ensures constant overlap. With h_c = Omega(1), this is O(1) classical cost.
